questions.subject: 英文

options: It’s nice of him to help you.

He’s grown into a young man.

How often do you walk to school?
How much do you pay for the rent? ˉ

what style would you recommend to me?
could you tell me what time the store closes?

questions.q: Bill: What did you think of the movie? Paul: I couldn’t wait for the movie to end. It was putting me to sleep. Bill: It was the best movie I’ve ever seen in years. Paul: Well, everyone has different tastes.

options: I’ll have a repairman go up there in a minute.
I’ll have the bellman take your bags up for you.
I’ll have the receptionist give you a wake-up call.
I’ll have a waiter bring you a menu up right away. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Jack: Do you want to have dinner at that steakhouse on Main Street? Jill: It just went out of business this Friday. Jack: I beg your pardon? Jill: I mean
options: it only serves business customers. ˉ ˉ III. 綜合測驗:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 2 2 至 3 1 題,每題有四個 選項,請依各篇短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 2 2 - 26 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該 空格的答案。 Have you ever imagined that you can chat with a robot instead of a real person? The techniques of Artificial Intelligence (AI) 22 become mature. Many companies, such as Google, Amazon, and Apple, have created smart voice assistants that can understand what you say, search for answers to your questions, and co mplete some tasks 23 on your instructions. More recently, chatbots, which are computer programs with AI techniques on apps, have been developed in order to present useful information whenever users request 24. From the perspectives of business, replacing humans 25 chatbots can save money. As a result, many companies nowadays want to develop their own chatbots. Therefore, people might lose their jobs due to the 26 of chatbots. At the same time, many new companies which build chatbots have sprung up, and this will create many new job opportunities. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the passage mainly about?
options: To show the process of making clean water.
To introduce a product that keeps water clean.
To examine how much water to drink per day.
To describe the ways to protect water sources.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, what does Eric Li do?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, why is the water bottle, Ecomo, smart?
options: Because it has a blue light.
Because it has a cheap monitor.
Because it uses a Bluetooth device.
Because it uses a big capacity bottle. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following statements is true about Ecomo?
options: Its filter removes unwanted substances fast.
It can change any liquid into drinking water.
Its filter tells users to change the LED monitor.
It can be used to store water, juice, or coffee. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following inferences can be drawn from Ecomo?
options: Users can easily get the weather report through the bottle.
Users can use it to make an appointment with their doctor.
Users can use it to find various water drinking sites nearby.
Users can decide how much water they should drink daily. ˉ - 6 -

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: What is the main purpose of the passage?
options: To give safety tips for all travelers.
To offer useful advice to backpackers.
To introduce foreign cultures and lifestyles.
To pick the best places for backpackers to visit.

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following is true about backpacking?
options: It has been a form of travel since the late twentieth century.
It takes more time to backpack in the summer than in the winter.
It is one option for young people to spend their summer vacation.
It requires students to work and support themselves while traveling. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following is NOT suggested for would-be backpackers to do in the passage?
options: Buy a prepaid phone card for emergencies only.
Make sure that they have enough spending money.
Try to know how to use their ATM cards overseas.
Give a copy of the travel documents to their family. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Why is convenient transportation important for backpackers?
options: Because they can get to the places they want easily.
Because they will stay abroad for as long as they wish.
Because they plan how much money they will spend daily.
Because they need a part-time job with free accommodations. ˉ

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Which of the following inferences can be drawn from the passage?
options: Young people choose package tours because of the low cost.
Countries with convenient transportation are not the choices for travelers.
Learning about foreign cultures and lifestyles is not possible for backpackers.
Backpacking trips offer young people some challenging tasks to accomplish. - 7 -
